<var>
$DPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$EXP$ = {{#expr:floor(50 * 1.09^(Level - 1))}}
$FNC-COST$ = 1850; 350; 1500; 6500; 21500
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 2550; 850; 1550; 8500; 18750
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 1; ;
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; ;
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Improved Handling; Specialized Tech; Geared Up; Futuristic Armory
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = 15184753790; 15184753514; 15184753289; 15184752970
$DREF$ = <ref name=dps>DPS does not consider rev-up time.</ref>
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.15 || 1.4 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 2 || 0.12 || 1.2 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.12 || 1.2 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 7 || 0.1 || 1 || 18 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 16 || 0.1 || 1 || 21 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Total Price !! Damage !! Firerate !! Rev-Up Time !! Range !! DPS$DREF$ !! Cost Efficiency
|-
| 0 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.18 || 1.4 || 16 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 1 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 3 || 0.17 || 1.2 || 17 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 2 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 5 || 0.17 || 1.2 || 18.5 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 3 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 13 || 0.15 || 1 || 19 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|-
| 4 || {{Money|$TP$}} || 20 || 0.1 || 1 || 20 || $DPS$ || {{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>
<!-- @se-ignore -->
|-|Level =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! Level !! Exp !! Total Exp
|-
| 0 || {{Exp|0}} || {{Exp|0}} 
|-
| 1 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|50}} 
|-
| 2 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|105}}
|-
| 3 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|164}}
|-
| 4 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|228}}
|-
| 5 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|298}}
|-
| 6 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|374}}
|-
| 7 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|457}}
|-
| 8 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|550}}
|-
| 9 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|653}}
|-
| 10 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|766}}
|-
| 11 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|889}}
|-
| 12 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,022}}
|-
| 13 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,165}}
|-
| 14 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,318}}
|-
| 15 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,485}}
|-
| 16 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,667}}
|-
| 17 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|1,865}}
|-
| 18 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,081}}
|-
| 19 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,316}} 
|-
| 20 || {{Exp|$EXP$}} || {{Exp|2,573}} 
|}
</div>
<!-- @/se-ignore -->
</tabber></div>
